overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a snowy, sci-fi stone town. The character walks through narrow streets, enters a workshop interior, then exits to climb stairs and cross a bridge with mountain views.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered stone street with industrial metal pipes

events.description: location text 'KIETKO SQUARE' appears on screen
character enters the large circular metal doorway into the building interior

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the snowy street toward the large circular building entrance

notable_agents.action: NPC in white robes standing near a wooden stall structure
NPC in heavy winter clothing walking ahead of the character

entered.detail: grey stone wall with industrial metal pipes and icicles hanging from roof
grey stone wall with vertical slit windows and warm interior lighting
massive circular metal door with orange rim serving as the building entrance
wall-mounted lanterns emitting warm orange glow against the cold stone
long icicles hanging from the edges of snow-covered roofs

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow snow-covered street between tall stone buildings with industrial metal piping. Icicles hang from the rooftops and warm lanterns provide contrast to the cool overcast lighting. The character approaches a large circular metal doorway while passing NPCs, with location text indicating 'KIETKO SQUARE' and then 'QUEEN'S ROAD' appearing on screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior workshop with stone floors and red fabric drapes

events.description: transition from cold natural outdoor light to warm artificial indoor lighting with candles and lamps
character approaches and exits through the circular doorway back to the outdoor environment

agents.ego_description: walking through the interior room, examining workbenches, rolled carpets, and various objects

entered.detail: wooden workbench with various items, tools, and a warm glowing lamp
large boulder or rock structure positioned in the middle of the room
several rolled up carpets or mats stacked vertically against the wall
green circular metal door at the far end of the interior space
red cloth drapes hanging from the ceiling adding warmth to the interior

segments.scene_description: Inside the circular building, the environment shifts to a warm artificially lit workshop with stone tile floors. The room contains a central workbench, a large rock formation, rolled carpets, and red fabric drapes hanging from the ceiling. The character explores the space before approaching the exit doorway, with no other people present inside.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stairway ascending to bridge with mountain views

events.description: exiting the building back to the snowy outdoor environment with natural lighting
character turns right to look at the distant mountain village and industrial structures

agents.ego_description: climbing the long stone staircase and crossing the bridge, pausing to admire the panoramic view

notable_agents.action: NPC in white robes standing motionless by the staircase railing
two NPCs walking down the stairs toward the character

entered.detail: the circular doorway now viewed from exterior as the exit point behind the character
long flight of stone steps ascending steeply between high stone walls
large stone archway marking the top of the staircase
metal railings with lantern posts lining the bridge walkway
sprawling village with smokestacks and buildings set against mountain peaks

segments.scene_description: Exiting the building, the character ascends a long snow-covered stone staircase flanked by high walls, passing NPCs coming down. At the top, the scene opens onto a bridge with metal railings where the character pauses to look at the expansive view of a distant mountain village with industrial smokestacks against the overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cold, narrow urban street through a warm interior and finally up to an expansive mountain vista. It begins by following the character through a snow-covered alleyway lined with stone buildings, industrial piping, and glowing lanterns, passing through Kietko Square and Queen's Road toward a circular metal doorway. As the character enters the building, the cool overcast light shifts to the warm artificial glow of a workshop filled with stone tiles, red fabric drapes, and a central workbench. The scene then transitions back outdoors as the character ascends a long, snow-dusted stone staircase flanked by high walls, passing other residents on the way up. Finally, the camera reaches the summit and opens onto a bridge with metal railings, revealing a wide view of a distant mountain village and industrial smokestacks under a gray sky.
